name: iMIS Association Management System API
what_it_does: iMIS Association Management System REST API for membership management, dues processing, and event management for associations and nonprofits. Enables AI agents to manage member record and contact management for association CRM automation, handle membership dues billing and renewal processing for revenue cycle management, access event registration and conference management for association event automation, retrieve chapter and component management for multi-chapter association structure, manage committee and volunteer tracking for association governance, handle certification and continuing education credit tracking for professional association compliance, access fundraising and donor management for nonprofit revenue development, retrieve analytics and reporting for association performance management, manage integration with accounting, email marketing, and LMS platforms, and automate membership onboarding and engagement lifecycle for association retention programs.
use_cases: Automating dues renewal from membership management agents
Managing event registration from conference agents
Tracking certifications from professional association agents
Reporting member analytics from association performance agents
not_for: Small associations without dedicated AMS requirements
Commercial membership programs without nonprofit/association context
Organizations using Salesforce NPSP or Fonteva exclusively
best_when: A professional association, trade association, or membership organization using iMIS wants AI agents to automate dues renewal, event registration, certification tracking, and member engagement lifecycle management.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL COMPLIANCE RISK: iMIS manages dues payments and event revenue — automated billing must maintain proper accounting records for nonprofit financial statement audit compliance. Association bylaws govern membership eligibility; automated membership status changes inconsistent with bylaws create governance liability. PCI-DSS compliance required for automated dues payment processing; cardholder data cannot be stored in logs or agent memory.

auth.notes: iMIS uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON (iMIS 20). Documentation at help.imis.com. Webhooks for membership events. Schaumburg, Illinois HQ (ASI — Advanced Solutions International). Private. Founded 1991. iMIS is the market-leading AMS for professional associations. 4,000+ association customers globally. Competes with Fonteva, MemberSuite, and Salesforce NPSP for association management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual per-member or per-user subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-member and module pricing
pricing.notes: Schaumburg, IL. ASI (Advanced Solutions International). Founded 1991. Private. 4,000+ association customers. Market-leading AMS. Competes with Fonteva and MemberSuite for association management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: GOVERNANCE RISK: Association bylaws govern membership eligibility and dues classification; automated membership status changes inconsistent with bylaws create association governance liability and member disputes
PCI-DSS dues payment — automated dues payment processing requires PCI-DSS compliant payment flow; cardholder data must not be stored in iMIS integration logs or agent memory

Certification credit compliance — professional association CPE/CEU credit tracking must comply with accreditation body standards (IACET, NASBA); automated credit award errors create accreditation audit findings

Chapter and component complexity — multi-chapter association data model requires understanding of chapter vs parent association data ownership; automated changes in wrong entity create data governance issues

GDPR for international associations — iMIS serves global associations; member data for EU members requires GDPR compliance including right to erasure; automated data processing must respect GDPR consent records
iMIS 20 vs iMIS EMS — iMIS has multiple deployment versions with different API capabilities; verify which iMIS version your customer uses — REST API availability varies by version
agent_readiness.security_notes: Association management. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US/EU/CA/AU. Member and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Association management. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. Global. Member and dues data.
